name: Wiyot

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Wiyot (wiyo1248).

notes: Skeleton. Algic language (a divergent isolate within Algic, alongside Yurok) of coastal northern California, written in an Americanist practical orthography. Digraphs kw/gw for labialized velars, ch=[tʃ], ts=[ts] and lh=[ɬ] are mapped, with the apostrophe for glottal stop. Predictable stress and any conditioned allophony are left unencoded, raising the PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Wiyot (wiyo1248)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
sources.notes: Classification reference for a skeleton-tier entry.
